summary: Testing of new Progress Dashboard feature (/progress route). Created new spec file with 15 E2E tests covering: page rendering, progress rings (4 categories), overall mastery bar, learning paths section, recently read section, 6 achievement badges, sidebar navigation, and localStorage progress tracking. All 15 tests passed. Also ran full regression suite - all 78 frontend tests passed (6 spec files), all 20 backend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing seeded data and localStorage injection
context_for_next_testing_agent: New progress dashboard tests created. Key testids: progress-dashboard, progress-hero, progress-rings, progress-overall, progress-paths, progress-recent, progress-achievements, badge-first-doc, badge-bookworm, badge-quiz-master, badge-module-pro, badge-path-finder, badge-halfway, sidebar-progress-btn, progress-path-{id}, progress-recent-{id}. LocalStorage keys: aa-docs-read (array of doc IDs), aa-quizzes-passed (array of doc IDs), aa-modules-passed (array of category IDs), aa-learning-progress (object). Helper functions added: navigateToProgress, clearProgressLocalStorage, setProgressLocalStorage.

progress_dashboard_rendering.details: Page renders at /progress with all main sections: hero, progress rings, overall mastery, learning paths, recently read, achievements.

progress_rings.details: 4 SVG progress rings display for: Docs Read, Quizzes Passed, Modules Passed, Paths Completed. Each shows percentage, current/total counts.

overall_mastery_bar.details: Overall Mastery section shows percentage bar with breakdown of docs, quizzes, modules, paths.

learning_paths_section.details: Shows all 4 learning paths with title, step count, mini progress bar, and percentage. Clicking navigates to /learn with path selected.

achievements_badges.details: 6 badge cards: First Steps (1 doc), Bookworm (10 docs), Quiz Ace (5 quizzes), Module Pro (3 modules), Pathfinder (1 path), Halfway There (50% mastery). Badges earn 'earned' class when criteria met.

recently_read_section.details: Shows last 5 read documents with title and Quiz Passed badge if applicable. Empty state shows prompt to start reading.

sidebar_navigation.details: My Progress link (sidebar-progress-btn) navigates to /progress. Link is highlighted/active when on progress page.

localstorage_tracking.details: Visiting a document adds to aa-docs-read localStorage array. Progress page reads from localStorage on mount.

level_display.details: Level badge shows Newcomer (0-19%), Explorer (20-49%), Practitioner (50-79%), Expert (80%+) based on overall progress.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh). All users treated as admin. No real Google OAuth flow.
